fields.name: Package Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the package that contains the data records that are being created.

fields.name: Table ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the ID of a table that has gone through configuration and created configuration records. Each configuration record that has not been successfully imported into the Microsoft Dynamics NAV database is listed.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the configuration record.

You cannot change the contents of this field.

fields.name: Invalid
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether a configuration record has an error that prevents it from being imported into the table. You can see the error information in the Config. Package Errors window.
